config.name: My Assistant
rules: You are a helpful coding assistant.

rawYaml:
name: My Assistant
version: 1.0.0
models:
  - name: Claude Sonnet 4.6
    provider: anthropic
    model: claude-sonnet-4-6
    roles: [chat, edit, apply]
rules:
  - You are a helpful coding assistant.
context:
  - provider: code
  - provider: docs
